steps.title: Set up the substitution test
steps.content: A point is a solution to $y < -4x + 4$ if substituting its coordinates makes the inequality true. We'll test each answer choice.

steps.title: Backsolving
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing choice B $(0, 5)$: Is $5 < -4(0) + 4 = 4$? No, $5 > 4$ fails.

Testing choice A $(-4, 0)$: Is $0 < -4(-4) + 4 = 16 + 4 = 20$? Yes, $0 < 20$ works. That matches choice A — A is correct.
